meta.name: ecommerce-two-products
meta.description: Dwa produkty drukowane (katalog spiralowany + zawieszki hotelowe) na szablonie ecommerce_raw. Kolory pilot: bialy, czerwony, czarny.

77.name: Katalogi spiralowane
77.description_on_image: Katalog spiralowany DL portrait (~0.47 aspect), metalowa spirala na dlugim boku, nadruk MOMENTS, ilustracja butelki perfum, spot UV na rogach

79.name: Zawieszki
79.description_on_image: Zawieszka hotelowa z zaokraglonym wierzcho?kiem i okraglym wycieciem na klamke; nadruki Do Not Disturb / Welcome, ikony ksiezyca i slonca

prompt_by_product.77: Product type: spiral-bound DL catalog with metal coil on long edge. Change ONLY cover color per Colors list. Keep spiral metal finish readable. Do not alter MOMENTS typography or central perfume-bottle illustration.
prompt_by_product.79: Product type: hotel door hanger with rounded top and circular handle cutout. Change ONLY cardstock background color per Colors list. Preserve all typography, icons, and die-cut shape.

77.text: clean white matte cover, white metal spiral binding, preserve all typography and central perfume-bottle illustration
vibrant red matte cover, white metal spiral binding, preserve all white typography and line-art illustration
matte black cover, silver metal spiral coil, preserve all print and spot UV floral corners

79.text: clean white cardstock, preserve Do Not Disturb and Welcome typography, moon and sun icons, die-cut hole
rich red matte cardstock, gold or white hotel typography, preserve icons and die-cut shape
matte black premium cardstock, gold or white typography, preserve moon and sun icons and die-cut hole

77: two spiral catalogs overlapping on desk at 45 degree angle, soft studio shadow
single catalog lying flat on wooden desk, top-down slight angle
one catalog standing slightly open on office shelf, subtle depth of field
79: two door hangers overlapping flat lay on reception counter
single door hanger hanging on hotel room door handle, natural perspective
door hangers displayed on small hotel reception stand, eye-level shot
